components.text: Found only in frozen places. The Qi stored carries a distinct chill. No useful effect raw — it needs the cauldron. More versatile than its cold nature suggests: essence gathering, soul work, antidotes, marrow cleansing. Bare hands when harvesting are a mistake.

Grows wild in snowy and frozen biomes — ice spikes, frozen peaks, snowy slopes. Also found in igloos and snowy village chests.

Can be grown as a crop.
